creator: vvelox@vvelox.net
text:
On Mon, 11 Jan 2010 02:15:00 UT
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of net/p5-Net-LDAP-AutoDNs,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/142662 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/142662

This is fine to submit. I've been holding back on this for a bit as
the only changes to it are stuff that will require another port
written at later time to make full use of it.

I will be finishing the stuff up for that shortly, but it is not
required for this version to work.
